PricingPage.title: Choose Your Plan
PricingPage.description: Select the plan that best fits your personal or business needs.

essential.description: Perfect for individuals who need a secure mailing address.

select.description: Ideal for professionals, remote workers and frequent travellers.

features.2: Choose between XS and S SafeBox, with the option to upgrade
features.6: Up to 5 document scans per month

signature.description: Our most popular plan for premium document management.

features.2: Choose between XS and S SafeBox, with the option to upgrade
features.3: Up to 25 document scans per month

executive.description: A complete business correspondence management solution.

features.2: Choose between XS and S SafeBox, with the option to upgrade
features.11: Priority handling of all incoming correspondence

additionalServices.title: Additional Services
additionalServices.description: Enhance your SafeBox membership with optional scanning, forwarding, secure storage and collection services tailored to your needs.

documentScanning.title: Document Scanning
documentScanning.description: Convert incoming correspondence and documents into secure digital copies.

expressScanning.title: Express Scanning
expressScanning.description: Receive an urgent digital copy of your document within one hour.

documentForwarding.title: Secure Document Forwarding
documentForwarding.description: Forward correspondence and important documents to your chosen destination.

internationalForwarding.title: International Forwarding
internationalForwarding.description: Worldwide forwarding for correspondence, documents and eligible parcels.

longTermStorage.title: Long-Term Secure Storage
longTermStorage.description: Keep documents and eligible items securely stored for an extended period.

additionalUser.title: Additional Authorised User
additionalUser.description: Authorise another trusted person to collect items from your SafeBox.

additionalSafeBox.title: Additional SafeBox
additionalSafeBox.description: Add another SafeBox to your membership when you need more capacity.

oversizedParcel.title: Oversized Parcel Handling
oversizedParcel.description: Receive and securely manage larger deliveries requiring special handling.

expressCollection.title: Express Parcel Collection
expressCollection.description: Priority preparation and handling for urgent parcel collection.

digitalArchive.title: Digital Document Archive
digitalArchive.description: Store scanned documents in a secure and organised digital archive.

businessAddOns.title: Business Add-Ons
businessAddOns.description: Advanced options for companies requiring secure team access, document management, reporting and dedicated support.

collectionAuthorisations.title: Multiple Collection Authorisations
collectionAuthorisations.description: Allow several approved people to collect correspondence and deliveries.

teamAccess.title: Team Access Management
teamAccess.description: Manage authorised users and access permissions for your organisation.

secureArchive.title: Secure Document Archive
secureArchive.description: Keep important business records securely organised and accessible.

digitalManagement.title: Digital Document Management
digitalManagement.description: Receive, organise and manage business documents digitally.

bulkScanning.title: Bulk Scanning
bulkScanning.description: Digitise larger volumes of documents efficiently and securely.

monthlyReporting.title: Monthly Reporting
monthlyReporting.description: Receive a monthly summary of correspondence, scans and activity.

prioritySupport.title: Priority Support
prioritySupport.description: Receive faster assistance for urgent operational requests.

accountManager.title: Dedicated Account Manager
accountManager.description: A single professional contact for your company’s SafeBox needs.

moreSpace.title: Need More Space?
moreSpace.description: Upgrade your SafeBox size at any time as your storage needs grow, subject to availability.
